summary: Backend testing for RealCheck Bulgarian fact-checking API. Wrote pytest suite covering 16 cases across health, validation, real Gemini 3.1 Pro analyze (article/product/news), list/get/404, favorite toggle on/off + favorites_only filter, stats aggregation and delete cleanup. All 16 tests passed in 36.5s.

minor.issue: logger is initialized AFTER it is referenced in /api/analyze exception handler (logger.exception). If LLM call fails before the bottom logging.basicConfig line is executed, this would raise NameError. Currently works because module import order makes 'logger' defined at module load before any request, but it's still a code-smell — move logging.basicConfig + logger = getLogger() above the routes.
@app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers. Non-blocking.
No pagination metadata returned (only limit query param). Acceptable for MVP.

action_items: (Optional) Move logger initialization above route definitions in server.py to avoid potential NameError ordering issue.
(Optional) Replace deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') with FastAPI lifespan context manager.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined at the bottom of the file but referenced inside /api/analyze (logger.exception). Works due to module-level execution order, but fragile — define logger right after imports.
server.py: _id is correctly excluded everywhere via projection={'_id': 0} and Pydantic AnalysisResult(**doc) — verified in tests, no leakage.
server.py: created_at stored as ISO string (datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()) — good, no Mongo BSON datetime serialization issues.
server.py: AnalyzeRequest uses Literal CheckType so invalid types get 422 from Pydantic — verified.
server.py: Single-file backend at 290 lines is fine for current scope; consider splitting models/routes if more features are added.
server.py: CORS allow_origins reads from env with '*' default — acceptable for MVP.
seed_data_creation: Tests create 3 transient analysis docs in MongoDB via real Gemini 3.1 Pro calls (article, product, news) and clean them up in TestZDelete. No persistent seed data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully verified. Test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is reusable as regression suite. It self-cleans created docs. Note: each analyze test makes a real LLM call (~10s each), full suite ~37s. Frontend not tested per request scope (backend only).
rca of the issue: No issues — all endpoints behave per spec. _id never leaks, created_at is ISO string, validation 400 for short text and 422 for invalid check_type, favorites flow + filter + stats aggregation all correct.
